where.if: AND (1=0 OR t.template_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR t.template_code ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND t.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND t.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND t.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND t.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyTemplate :: selectById */ t.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_tt.code_label AS template_type_cd_nm FROM sy_template t LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = t.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_tt ON cd_tt.code_grp = 'TEMPLATE_TYPE' AND cd_tt.code_value = t.template_type_cd WHERE t.template_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyTemplate :: selectList */ t.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_tt.code_label AS template_type_cd_nm FROM sy_template t LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = t.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_tt ON cd_tt.code_grp = 'TEMPLATE_TYPE' AND cd_tt.code_value = t.template_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyTemplate :: selectPageList */ t.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_tt.code_label AS template_type_cd_nm FROM sy_template t LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = t.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_tt ON cd_tt.code_grp = 'TEMPLATE_TYPE' AND cd_tt.code_value = t.template_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(t.*) /* base.sy :: SyTemplate :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_template t
